revision.comment: create siterlink meta-template
fix
correct image for meta
Protected Template:Sister: [[WP:PPOL#indef|Highly visible template]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
allow image override
larger
allow full image tag
fix
actual image
correct wikiquote image
add link to image
smaller image
alter wikibooks logo per [[Template talk:Wikibooks]]
per talk page edit request
fix wiktionary link
update per editprotected
add Wikipedia interwikis
revision.text:
{{side box |position = {{{position|}}} |image = <!--
-->{{#switch:{{{image|}}} |none= |=[[Image:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{project|}}}}} |commons = Commons-logo.svg |meta|metawiki|m = Wikimedia Community Logo.svg |wikibooks|wbk|wb|b = Wikibooks-logo-en-noslogan.svg |wikiquote|quote|wqt|q = Wikiquote-logo-en.svg |wikipedia|wp|w = Wikipedia-logo-en.png |wikisource|source|ws|s = Wikisource-logo.svg |wiktionary|wkt|wdy|d = Wiktionary-logo-en.svg |wikinews|news|wnw|n = Wikinews-logo.svg |wikispecies|species = Wikispecies-logo.svg |wikiversity|wvy|v = Wikiversity-logo.svg |mediawiki|mw = Mediawiki.png |#default = Wikimedia-logo.svg }}|40px|link={{#switch:{{lc:{{{project}}}}} |commons = commons |meta|metawiki|m = meta |wikibooks|wbk|wb|b = b |wikiquote|quote|wqt|q = q |wikipedia|wp|w = w |wikisource|source|ws|s = s |wiktionary|wkt|wdy|d = wikt |wikinews|news|wnw|n = n |wikispecies|species = species |wikiversity|wvy|v = v |mediawiki|mw = mw |#default = }}:{{{1|Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}}}}|Search {{#switch:{{lc:{{{project}}}}} |commons = Wikimedia Commons |meta|metawiki|m = Meta |wikibooks|wbk|wb|b = Wikibooks |wikiquote|quote|wqt|q = Wikiquote |wikipedia|wp|w = Wikipedia |wikisource|source|ws|s = Wikisource |wiktionary|wkt|wdy|d = Wiktionary |wikinews|news|wnw|n = Wikinews |wikispecies|species = Wikispecies |wikiversity|wvy|v = Wikiversity |mediawiki|mw = MediaWiki |#default = sister project }}]] |{{{image}}} }}<!--
--> |text = {{{text}}} |below = {{{below|}}} |imageright = {{{imageright|}}} }}<noinclude> {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding {{sec link image}} so we get secure links when using the secure server, see [[WT:SEC#Sister project links]]. And changing "40px" to "40x40px", since some of the logos were a bit large.
Adding the "lang" parameter, so we can link to other languages.
implement plainlinks here
Remove spurious image link, set alt text to blank per accessibility.
remove {{pp-template}}
change wikipedia logo, per request
add outreach wiki, per request
per edit request
add incubator
add wikidata and wikivoyage, per request of [[User:JamesA]]
change logo
update to new Wikivoyage logo per request https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Template_talk:Sister&oldid=571171103#Edit_request_.28legal_reasons.29

Changed protection level of Template:Sister: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: allow template editors ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
Per edit request on talk page.
|metadata=no (let this display on mobile)
Dekimasu moved page [[Template:Sister]] to [[Template:Sister project]] over redirect: per request on the talk page and listing at [[WP:RM]]; please revert if this breaks anything
add sistersitebox to |class= per [[Template talk:Sister project#Template-protected edit request on 31 March 2015]]
using [[File:Wiktionary icon.svg]]. EN wiktionary logo changed (req attr)
rm link= altogether; many need CC attribution (link previously existing might have had something to do with Image: vs File: ??)

[[File:Wiktionary-logo-en.svg]] is ineligible for copyright and therefore in the public domain because it consists entirely of information that fails the [[Commons:Threshold of originality|threshold of originality]].
Undid revision 728338398 by [[Special:Contributions/Godsy|Godsy]] ([[User talk:Godsy|talk]]) self revert
class=noviewer to prevent thumbnails from showing up with the Media Viewer
unlinked images with null alt text (accessibility error); WMF owned images
wkt logo renamed
update wikiversity logo per TPER
use new MediaWiki logo [[:File:MediaWiki-2020-icon.svg]] - no text version as that seems to be used for most other projects
pass 'textclass' and 'textstyle' params
per edit request on talk page - include "c" for commons and "wikt" for wiktionary
"iw" for interwiki link (other-language WPs)
Add wikifunctions per request
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Sister_project]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot
move @print none to templatestyles from [[MediaWiki:Print.css]] to support [[MediaWiki talk:Common.css/to do#Turn mobile.css/js totally off]]
that's a copyright violation
Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1263695872|1263695872]] by [[Special:Contributions/Theleekycauldron|Theleekycauldron]] ([[User talk:Theleekycauldron|talk]]) whoopsie, broke TPECON
okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly

okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly
okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly

okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly

okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly

okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly

okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly
okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly

1 revision imported from [[:en:Template:Sister_project]]
okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly
1 revision imported: overwriting this page since it for some reason started to get issues
Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly

1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly
1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly
1 revision imported: overwriting
okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly
1 revision imported: overwriting
okay, tested and everything, reinstating correctly
1 revision imported: overwriting
use "logo" for alt, because unable to set both aria-hidden and tabindex=-1 on Wiki image
1 revision imported: overwriting
use centralized logo module to ensure correct image/alt/link/class for every project
use centralized logo module to ensure correct image/alt/link/class for every project
1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
1 revision imported: en
use centralized logo module to ensure correct image/alt/link/class for every project
1 revision imported: en
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
